title: From the nineteenth chapter

source.title: ANF07. Fathers of the Third and Fourth Centuries: Lactantius, Venantius, Asterius, Victorinus, Dionysius, Apostolic Teaching and Constitutions, Homily, and Liturgies

verses.book: Commentary on the Apocalypse of the Blessed John
verses.text: “And I saw heaven opened, and behold a white horse; and he that sat upon him was called Faithful and True.”]

verses.book: Commentary on the Apocalypse of the Blessed John
verses.text: The horse, and He that sits upon him, sets forth our Lord coming to His kingdom with the heavenly army.

verses.book: Commentary on the Apocalypse of the Blessed John
verses.text: Because from the sea of the north, which is the Arabian Sea, even to the sea of Phœnice, and even to the ends of the earth, they will command these greater parts in the coming of the Lord Jesus, and all the souls of the nations will be assembled to judgment.
